body_txt: Sometimes what seems to be a Ridiculously Human Robot isn't actually all that ridiculously human after all. It may look human, it may even be anatomically correct, but the illusion of humanity lasts only as long as that robot is silent or stationary , since the moment it speaks or moves the illusion goes flying out the window . Can occasionally invoke the Uncanny Valley . Happens often with a Rotten Robotic Replacement .
